title: anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. furumii
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. furumii, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Sweet vernal grass is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
